summary: Terminal Feature Testing Complete - Kellner-Terminal for Little Eat Italy. All 18 backend API tests passed, all frontend UI flows verified. Terminal enables waiters to login with PIN, select tables, add menu items to cart with course selection, and submit orders to print queue.
passed_tests: API: POST /api/terminal/login with Marco PIN (1111) returns token and waiter_name
API: POST /api/terminal/login with Lucia PIN (2222) returns token and waiter_name
API: POST /api/terminal/login with invalid PIN (9999) returns 401 'Ungültiger PIN'
API: POST /api/terminal/login with short PIN returns 400
API: POST /api/terminal/login with empty PIN returns 400/401
API: GET /api/terminal/tables returns 10 active tables
API: GET /api/terminal/menu returns 5 menu items (Margherita, Salami, Bruschetta, Tiramisu, Cola)
API: GET /api/terminal/categories returns categories: Vorspeise, Pizza, Nachspeise, Getränke
API: POST /api/terminal/orders creates order and returns order_number, order_id, total
API: GET /api/terminal/orders returns all terminal orders
API: GET /api/terminal/orders/today returns today's orders
API: GET /api/terminal/waiters (admin) returns 2 waiters: Marco and Lucia
API: POST /api/terminal/waiters (admin) creates new waiter with unique PIN
API: POST /api/terminal/waiters rejects duplicate PIN with 400 'PIN bereits vergeben'
API: POST /api/terminal/tables (admin) creates new table
API: GET /api/terminal/menu/all (admin) returns all menu items including inactive
API: POST /api/terminal/menu (admin) creates new menu item
API: GET /api/print-queue/pending returns pending print jobs
UI: /terminal shows PIN login screen with chef icon and number pad
UI: PIN entry shows 4 boxes that fill with green dots
UI: Valid PIN login (1111) shows table selection with 'Hallo Marco!'
UI: Valid PIN login (2222) shows table selection with 'Lucia' name
UI: Invalid PIN (9999) shows 'Ungültiger PIN' error message
UI: Table selection shows all 10 tables in grid layout
UI: After table selection, menu view shows categories (Vorspeise, Pizza, Nachspeise, Getränke)
UI: Pizza category shows Margherita (10.50€) and Salami (11.50€)
UI: Item detail shows ANZAHL (quantity), GANG (course selection), NOTIZ (notes), HINZUFÜGEN button
UI: Course selection includes Vorspeise, Hauptspeise, Nachspeise, Getränke
UI: Adding item shows toast '1x [item] hinzugefügt' and updates cart count
UI: Cart shows items with course, quantity controls, total, and 'BON DRUCKEN' button
UI: Order submission shows 'GESENDET!' with checkmark and 'Bon wird gedruckt...'
UI: Order submission creates print queue entry (verified in API)
Admin: /admin/shop shows TERMINAL tab
Admin: TERMINAL tab shows 3 sub-tabs: Kellner (2), Tische (10), Inhouse-Menü (5)
Admin: Kellner section shows Marco (PIN 1111) and Lucia (PIN 2222) with edit/delete
Admin: Kellner section has '+ KELLNER HINZUFÜGEN' button
Admin: Tische section shows all 10 tables with '+ TISCH HINZUFÜGEN' button
Admin: Inhouse-Menü shows categories (VORSPEISE, PIZZA, NACHSPEISE) with items and prices
Admin: Inhouse-Menü has '+ ARTIKEL HINZUFÜGEN' button
critical_code_review_comments: Terminal uses 4-digit PIN authentication with JWT tokens (12h expiry)
PIN uniqueness enforced at API level - duplicate PINs rejected with 400
Terminal orders automatically added to print_queue collection
Course selection (Gang) stored with each order item
localStorage used for terminal session (terminal_token, terminal_waiter_name, terminal_waiter_id)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Terminal Feature fully tested. Key features: 1) PIN login at /terminal with Marco (1111) and Lucia (2222) 2) Table selection (10 tables) 3) Menu with categories (Vorspeise, Pizza, Nachspeise, Getränke) 4) Item detail with course selection and notes 5) Cart with BON DRUCKEN submission 6) Orders added to print_queue collection 7) Admin TERMINAL tab at /admin/shop with Kellner, Tische, Inhouse-Menü management

terminal_features_verified.waiter_login: POST /api/terminal/login with 4-digit PIN returns JWT token
terminal_features_verified.menu_display: GET /api/terminal/menu returns items with categories and prices
terminal_features_verified.categories: GET /api/terminal/categories returns unique categories from menu
terminal_features_verified.order_creation: POST /api/terminal/orders creates order and print queue entry
terminal_features_verified.admin_waiters: Admin can view/add/edit/delete waiters with unique PINs
terminal_features_verified.admin_menu: Admin can view/add/edit/delete inhouse menu items
terminal_features_verified.print_queue: Orders automatically added to print queue on submission
